name: WESTERN ALLIANCE BANCORPORATION
business: WAL is a bank holding company that provides a full spectrum of customized loan, deposit, and treasury management capabilities, including digital payment offerings, mortgage banking services, and corporate trust services through its subsidiaries.
sellsTo: sophisticated commercial institutions and investors within niche industries

exposures.sentence: The Company also serves business customers through a national platform of specialized financial services, including mortgage banking services through AmeriHome and digital payment services for the class action legal industry.
Residential: Residential loans comprise 25% and 27% of the Company's loan portfolio as of December 31, 2025 and 2024, respectively.

catalysts.event: Brand unity initiative completed, consolidating legacy division bank brands under a single name Western Alliance Bank
catalysts.sentence: Effective as of October 4, 2025, the Company completed its brand unity initiative, consolidating its legacy division bank brands: ABA, BON, FIB, Bridge, and TPB, under a single unified name, Western Alliance Bank.
Most recently, we completed a CFO transition in January 2026.
